title: Recurring VPN disconnects for remote users
description: Multiple incidents show tunnel drops during network transitions and DHCP renewal events.
root_cause: Client keepalive mismatch with gateway profile
workaround: Apply VPN client profile v2.3

title: Exchange sync latency spikes
description: Intermittent queue backlog in email cluster causing sync delays.
workaround: Restart transport service on passive node

title: Payroll DB deadlocks in month-end batch
description: Lock contention between report and posting jobs.
root_cause: Missing composite index on payroll_transactions
workaround: Run report in read-only replica window

title: Wi-Fi instability floor 5
description: AP channel overlap and RF interference cause packet loss.
root_cause: Auto-channel policy conflict
workaround: Pin channels 36/44/149 for floor 5 APs

title: MFA reset propagation delay
description: Identity backend replication lag after token reset.
workaround: Force sync for user object

title: ITSM portal performance degradation
description: Portal API throttling under attachment load.
root_cause: Inefficient attachment upload retries
workaround: Upload files under 20MB until patch

title: ERP access and latency incidents
description: Multiple errors tied to ERP memory pressure during batch windows.
workaround: Scale app pool during batch windows

title: CMDB discovery authentication failures
description: Probe loses trust with expired certificate chain.
root_cause: Probe certificate lifecycle not monitored
workaround: Renew cert and restart probe service

title: Monitoring data delay on network metrics
description: Collector lag affects dashboard freshness.
workaround: Temporarily reduce scrape interval fanout

title: Knowledge search relevancy regressions
description: Semantic ranker overweights stale articles.
root_cause: Rank boost misconfiguration for article age
workaround: Manual curation of VPN-related article boosts

title: Recurring ERP login failures during peak hours
description: SAP S/4HANA login service times out for multiple users between 09:00-10:00 HKT on weekdays. Root cause traced to connection pool exhaustion on the application server.
root_cause: SAP application server connection pool set to 200; peak concurrent logins reach 240+
workaround: Stagger login times — users with surnames A-M log in before 09:15, N-Z after 09:30

title: Intermittent email delivery delays to external recipients
description: Outbound emails from GlobalCorp Exchange Server experience 10-30 minute delivery delays. Issue is sporadic and difficult to reproduce consistently.
workaround: Use web mail portal for time-sensitive external communications

title: API Gateway rate limiting incorrectly blocking internal services
description: Kong API Gateway applies external rate limits to internal microservice calls, causing cascading 429 errors during high-traffic periods.
root_cause: Missing consumer group tag on internal service accounts — rate limit policy applies globally instead of per-consumer-group
workaround: Whitelist internal service IPs in Kong rate-limit plugin config

title: Recurring cmdb degradation under load (cmdb-9010001)
description: Repeated cmdb incidents share a common failure pattern during peak load.
root_cause: Resource contention in the cmdb layer not bounded by current limits.
workaround: Apply conservative limits and shed non-critical cmdb load.

title: Recurring database degradation under load (database-9010002)
description: Repeated database incidents share a common failure pattern during peak load.
root_cause: Resource contention in the database layer not bounded by current limits.
workaround: Apply conservative limits and shed non-critical database load.
